message:
fix(wasm32): bypass LLVM FastISel u64 return bug for float values

Route CompressedValue → JSValue conversions through C helper function
to bypass Zig Issue #20966 (LLVM FastISel corrupts hi 32 bits when
returning u64 from WASM32 functions).

Changes:
- Add frozen_cv_to_jsvalue() C helper in runtime_helpers.h
- Add toJSValueWithCtx() method to CompressedValue (WASM32 calls C
  helper, native just calls toJSValue for API compatibility)
- Update code generators to use toJSValueWithCtx(ctx) for returns

Fixes: 1 / 2 returning -0.375 instead of 0.5
